src: A gray bear statue is on a flat rock with a pedestal, within a forested area, mid-step. Tall trees with textured bark and ground foliage are behind, sunlight and shadows enhance the sculpture's details.
edit: A gleaming, metallic bear statue stands atop a neon-lit platform in a futuristic urban jungle. The bear is captured mid-step with LED accents along its limbs. Towering digital trees with holographic leaves and luminescent ground circuitry form a vibrant backdrop that contrasts against the sleek, robotic form of the statue.
